goal: Supabase/Postgres-backed multi-organization Orun SaaS control plane
notes: Task 0020 verified PASS: cursor pagination for membership list endpoints merged via PR #61.
PR #61 squash-merged at dc9b191; verifier added cursor format validation (timestamp+UUID regex) and implementer report.
Post-merge main CI run 26366468768 passed (13/13 jobs). PR CI run 26366391926 passed (13/13 jobs).
Verifier fix: hardened decodeCursor to reject invalid ISO timestamps and non-UUID ids at HTTP layer (422) instead of letting them hit Postgres (500).
Both list endpoints paginated: GET /v1/organizations, GET /v1/organizations/{orgId}/members. Default limit 50, max 100.
Cursors are opaque, versioned (v:1), base64-encoded with (created_at DESC, id DESC) tie-breaker pairs.
65 membership-worker tests pass (2 new cursor validation tests); 177 db tests; 64 api-edge tests.
Orun plan: 6 components × 3 envs → 12 jobs. All pass.
Remaining gaps: invitation/member-admin routes, audit/events, durable idempotency, batch role-lookup.
Dead parameters (dryRunCommand, deployCommand) remain in component.yaml files; recommend cleanup.
Ignored generated outputs must not be staged or committed: dist, node_modules, .orun, Terraform dirs, plan.json.
